title: Legal Information
description:
All information provided on our website is for general informational purposes only.
We make every effort to ensure accuracy, but we do not guarantee the completeness or reliability of any information.
Use of any information from this site is strictly at your own risk.

title: Service Terms
description:
All services including installation, maintenance, training, and consultancy are subject to agreed terms and conditions.
Quotations provided are valid for a limited time and may change based on market conditions.
Service timelines may vary depending on equipment availability and client requirements.

title: Limitation of Liability
description:
We are not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services or website.
Clients are responsible for ensuring proper usage and maintenance of equipment after installation.
We are not responsible for losses caused by improper handling or unauthorized modifications.

title: Third-Party Services
description:
We work with partner manufacturers and suppliers to deliver equipment and services.
We are not responsible for the policies, warranties, or actions of third-party companies.
Clients should review the terms and conditions of partner manufacturers separately.

title: Updates & Changes
description:
We reserve the right to update or modify these terms at any time without prior notice.
Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website.
We encourage users to review this section periodically for updates.

title: Contact Information
description:
For any questions regarding our terms or legal information, please contact us at maxibobd@gmail.com or call +8801680 329598.
We aim to respond to all inquiries within 5 business days.
